expectations.text: Response uses the output template format (### [N]. [Topic Title])
expectations.evidence: Contains '### 1. Eval Runner: What Actually Executes the Evals?' — coincidentally follows the template format.

expectations.text: Response contains exactly one question, not multiple
expectations.evidence: The single question block contains two sub-questions: 'How are evals currently being run?' AND 'does auto-run mean re-running the LLM or something lighter?'
Contains '- *Recommendation*: Before wiring up CI/CD, pin down the eval execution contract first.'

expectations.text: Response does NOT deliver a final verdict or summary
expectations.evidence: No final approval or conclusion. Ends with the first question.

expectations.text: Agent notes it used or would use AskUserQuestion tool
expectations.evidence: No mention of AskUserQuestion tool — delivered as plain markdown.

expectations.text: Agent explored the codebase before asking (mentions files or structure found)
expectations.evidence: Response explicitly describes codebase findings: flat structure, no runner, no docs/decisions/, TODO status.
